reels.title: Bui Vien Sunday Night — Neon Chaos 🌙
reels.concept: Walking through pedestrian-only street, neon lights, street food, beers
reels.hook: POV: It's Sunday night in Saigon and the streets are ALIVE

reels.title: MICHELIN Crab Noodles for ₹158 🦀
reels.concept: Banh Canh Cua Ba Ba — close-up of crab broth, queue, sells out by 1PM
reels.hook: This ₹158 MICHELIN noodle bowl sells out every single day

reels.title: World's Longest Oversea Cable Car 🚡
reels.concept: 4-island tour, cable car POV, sea walking helmet cam
reels.hook: I walked on the OCEAN FLOOR in Vietnam

reels.title: VinWonders $12M Show 🎢
reels.concept: Theme park day + THE ONCE show — fire, water, light spectacle
reels.hook: This $12M show is INCLUDED in a ₹3,410 theme park ticket

reels.title: Fansipan — Roof of Indochina 🏔️
reels.concept: Cable car ascent, summit clouds, Buddha statue, 10-min queue flex
reels.hook: 2 hour queue on Sunday. 10 minutes on Tuesday. Timing is EVERYTHING.

reels.title: Halong Bay — Nature's Masterpiece 🚢
reels.concept: Cruise through limestone karsts, cave exploration, kayaking
reels.hook: This is why Halong Bay is a UNESCO World Heritage Site

reels.title: Train Street — Inches from Death 🚂
reels.concept: Drinking coffee as train passes 2 feet away
